living working Wiesbaden, Germany, born 1954 Antwerpen, Belgium.
studied art, history philosophy University Mainz, Germany 1970's.
works, international collaborations, projects date from 1996.
Strasser's work appeared several over world since 1997, i.e.
ArtOnLine (Brazil); frAme trAce (UK); TEXT (Australia); DOC(K)S notre web" (book CD-ROM), Corse 2000; Guide (book CD-ROM version), Frauenhofer Institut, Germany 2000; Festival Nottingham, 1999; E-POETRY festival, Buffalo/New York, 2001; medi@terra Athens, 2001; Mostra Interpoesia, Paulo, 2001; COSIGN 2002, Augsburg, Germany; 2002, Milano; SeNef 2003, Korea; Computer Space Festival, Sofia 2003; several contributions projects Biennale Venice, 1999, 2001, 2003; AJAC Exhibition, Metropolitan Museum, Tokyo, 1999, 2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005; FILE 2001, 2004, 2005, Paulo.
